name: DORSAL DERMAL SINUS
definition: epithelium-lined dural tube extending from skin surface to intracanalicular space + frequently

demographics.Associated with: epidermoid / dermoid tumors in up to 20%

dominant_finding: groove in upper surface of spinous process + lamina of vertebra
discriminating_features: groove in upper surface of spinous process + lamina of vertebra

general: groove in upper surface of spinous process + lamina of vertebra
sinus may terminate in conus medullaris / filum terminale / nerve root / fibrous nodule on
nerve roots bound down to capsule of dermoid / epidermoid cyst
displacement / compression of cord by extramedullary dermoids / epidermoids
expansion of cord by intramedullary dermoids / epidermoids
clumping of nerve roots from adhesive arachnoiditis
